# Texas Cemetery Brokers
> Licensed cemetery brokerage helping Texas families buy and sell cemetery plots, mausoleum crypts, and burial spaces across Dallas, Houston, Austin, and San Antonio. Powered by Bayer Cemetery Brokers — 27 years of experience and 9,000+ transactions. Save 30–50% versus retail cemetery prices.

## Services
- [Buy Cemetery Plots in Texas](/buy): Browse discounted cemetery plots, niches, and crypts across Texas.
- [Sell a Cemetery Plot in Texas](/sell): Free valuation, no upfront fees, 30–60 day close.
- [Browse Listings](/properties): Current inventory of cemetery properties for sale across Texas.
- [Property Types](/property-types): Guide to burial plots, crypts, niches, and family estates.

## About
- [Our Partners](/partners): Our partnership with Bayer Cemetery Brokers.
- [Our Team](/team): The Texas Cemetery Brokers team.

## Resources
- [Blog](/blog): Expert guidance on Texas cemetery property and the resale process.
